changeSet.author: claude
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE compliance_threshold DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_compliance_threshold_type;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE compliance_threshold DROP CONSTRAINT chk_compliance_threshold_type
ALTER TABLE compliance_threshold ADD CONSTRAINT chk_compliance_threshold_type CHECK (threshold_type IN ( 'RANGE', 'MINIMUM', 'MAXIMUM', 'EXACT', 'BORDERLINE', 'DESCRIPTIVE' ))
